title: RBCD: msDS-AllowedToActOnBehalfOfOtherIdentity Modified (Event 5136)
description: Detects writes to the msDS-AllowedToActOnBehalfOfOtherIdentity attribute via Directory Service object modification (Event 5136), the core of a Resource-Based Constrained Delegation (RBCD) takeover. The schemaIDGUID 3f78c3e5-f79a-46bd-a0b8-9d18116ddc79 identifies the attribute. GOAD uses webdav+RBCD to take over computer objects.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and (('Event ID' = '5136' and ('Properties' like '*3f78c3e5-f79a-46bd-a0b8-9d18116ddc79*' or 'Properties' like '*msDS-AllowedToActOnBehalfOfOtherIdentity*')))
